## nsc artifact upload

Upload an artifact.

### Synopsis

Upload an artifact.

```
nsc artifact upload [src] [dest] [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --expires_in duration   If set, sets the artifact's expiration into the specified future. (default 0s)
  -h, --help                  help for upload
      --namespace string      Target namespace of the artifact. (default "main")
      --pack string           A glob pattern to select files to zip and upload.
```
